title: trifolium tembense
intro: Trifolium tembense is a species of legume in the pea family, commonly known as the African clover or red clover, that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The health benefits of Trifolium tembense include relief from menopausal symptoms, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Trifolium tembense include tea, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
